title: malachra helodes
intro: Malachra helodes, also known as the 'bushy jigger', is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The extracts from Malachra helodes have been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing numerous health benefits including reduced inflammation and protection against infections. In herbal preparations, Malachra helodes is often used to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
